items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 Cream White and Blue Enamel/Medium】This Capucines Medium handbag features soft, elegant tones that highlight the classic silhouette. items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot g11299 White Multicolor】This Emily notebook cover is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, playfully reinterpreting the brand's classic elements with Monogram Multicolor canvas. The elegant background features Murakami's aesthetic colorful prints, while the leather interior flap and replaceable design add artisanal details. It can be paired with the Jane notebook, making it an elegant choice for long-lasting companionship. 22.5 x 2 x 14 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M12635 Embossed】This compact Victor wallet is made of Monogram Shadow calfskin, adorned with delicate Monogram embossed patterns, exuding a 'low-key luxury' temperament. The interior features a practical divider, a zippered pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flip cover features a snap button design and is adorned with the Louis Vuitton logo. 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13403 Black & Colorful】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami collaboration series classic card holder brings a playful new interpretation with rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas, the classic Monogram pattern is designed with the iconic vivid colors of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, while the top is accented with a bright pink color. The card holder is suitable for large business cards and receipts inside, and features two classic card slots on the outside. 11 x 7 x 0.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13409 Black Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zip coin purse features a timeless design that blends practical functionality with playful style, adding vitality to the season. The coin purse is made of monogram coated canvas and features joyful rainbow tones, paying tribute to Takashi Murakami's iconic vivid color style. The coin purse has a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M13656 Cream Embossing】 This season's Nano Noé backpack features an exquisite two-tone design, suitable for both day and night looks. Crafted in leather with a gold chain strap, the lighter Monogram embossed pattern is accented with contrasting borders. The interior offers ample space for daily essentials like a phone, small wallet, and lipstick. 19 x 15 x 10 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M13992 Black/Color】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This Zippy coin wallet is made of Monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. Named for its secure wrap-around zip, it features a grained leather lining. Fully functional, it can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M14017 Monogram】 The Louis Vuitton Noé Cargo bucket bag is constructed with Monogram canvas and features vintage leather trim, inheriting the Noé bucket bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne bottles. The wide front pocket and exquisite details pay homage to Louis Vuitton's long history while meeting modern needs. The top handle and shoulder strap are both detachable for flexible portability. 24 x 16 x 22 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14092 Black Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series key pouch is made of monogram coated canvas and features playful rainbow tones, inspired by the passionate and lively aesthetics of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami.
